about.metaTitle: About Habb Switzerland – IT, Software & AI for Swiss SMEs
about.metaDescription: Habb Switzerland builds AI automation, software and ERP solutions for Swiss SMEs. Get to know our story, our team and our values.

offerings.title: Our solutions for Swiss SMEs
offerings.intro: From intelligent ERP software to AI-powered email automation – discover how we support your business.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: Habb Switzerland was founded in Switzerland with the vision of combining traditional Swiss values such as precision, reliability, and quality with modern technological innovation.
story.p2: As brothers with strong academic backgrounds in Computer Science and Business Information Systems, we bring together deep technical expertise and a solid understanding of business processes. Our shared mission is to support Swiss companies in adopting AI automation, digital transformation, and intelligent IT solutions in a practical and sustainable way.
story.p3: We believe that technology should empower businesses and not complicate them. That is why our team works relentlessly to deliver solutions that are not only technically excellent, but also efficient, user-friendly, and tailored to real-world business needs.
story.p4: Today, we serve clients across industries, helping them navigate the digital landscape with confidence and success.

precision.title: Precision
precision.description: Every solution we deliver is crafted with meticulous attention to detail.

smartmail.metaTitle: Email Automation & AI Quotations for SMEs | HABB AI Solutions
smartmail.metaDescription: HABB AI Solutions automates your email inbox: AI classifies messages and prepares quotations as ready drafts in your ERP software. FADP-compliant. Get in touch.
smartmail.productName: HABB AI Solutions – Email Automation for SMEs
smartmail.tagline: Automatic Email Classification & AI Based Quotation Generation
smartmail.overviewText:
HABB AI Solutions is an intelligent email automation solution for SMEs. The system analyses incoming emails, automatically detects invoices, quotation requests, general inquiries or spam, and processes them in a structured manner.
Complete quotation requests are transferred directly to your accounting or ERP software and prepared as a draft. If information is missing, the AI automatically requests it via email. Employees only review the generated draft and send the quotation.
Data is stored either in Switzerland or Germany – fully compliant with DSG and GDPR.

habbOne.metaTitle: ERP Software for Swiss SMEs – Quotes, Orders & Invoices | HABB One
habbOne.metaDescription: HABB One is the modular ERP software for Swiss SMEs: quotations, orders, time tracking and QR invoices in one system – tailored to your industry. Request a no-obligation demo.
habbOne.productName: HABB One – the intelligent ERP for Swiss SMEs
habbOne.tagline: Create quotations, orders and invoices effortlessly – an intelligent ERP, tailored to your industry and processes.
habbOne.overviewText:
HABB One is an intelligent ERP system for Swiss SMEs. It simplifies your daily operations – from quotation to order to invoice – and turns time-consuming steps into a few clicks.
Every company works differently. That is why HABB One is tailored individually to your industry and your processes – you work the way that suits you best, instead of bending to rigid software.
Productive from day one, bilingual (DE/EN) and Swiss-compliant. First reference installation: Tschannen Spritzwerk AG, Burgdorf.

Attendance, balances and holidays always up to date – no Excel sheets."},{"icon":"Calendar","title":"Clear Scheduling","description":"Plan orders and staff easily and see capacity at a glance at any time."},{"icon":"BarChart3","title":"Reports at the Push of a Button","description":"Revenue, orders and attendance as CSV, Excel or PDF – the figures whenever you need them."},{"icon":"ShieldCheck","title":"Tailored to Your Industry","description":"Modular and individually adapted to your processes – bilingual (DE/EN) and Swiss-compliant."}]

habbOne.teaserText: Quotations, orders and invoices easier than ever – tailored to your industry and processes. Send a no-obligation enquiry now.

intro.title: Introduction and Scope
intro.content:
Habb Switzerland takes the protection of your personal data seriously. This privacy policy explains which personal data we collect, for which purposes we process it, and which rights you have.
It applies to the website www.habb.ch and to all related services provided by Habb Switzerland. The Swiss Data Protection Act (revFADP) and, where applicable, the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) govern this policy.

controller.title: Data Controller
controller.content:
The controller responsible for processing your personal data is:
Habb Switzerland, Sonnheimstrasse 6, 3415 Rüegsauschachen, Switzerland
For any privacy-related matters, you can reach us at privacy@habb.ch.

collection.title: Data We Process
collection.content:
We only process data that is necessary to operate our website and deliver our services:
• Contact and communication data you provide via the contact form or by email (e.g. name, company, email address, phone number, message)
• Contract and customer data within the scope of a business relationship
• Technical data automatically generated when you visit the website (e.g. IP address, date and time of access, browser type, operating system, pages visited)
• Usage data from cookies and comparable technologies

purposes.title: Purposes and Legal Bases
purposes.content:
We process your data for the following purposes:
• Responding to your inquiries and getting in touch with you
• Providing, managing and invoicing our services
• Operating, securing and optimising our website
• Complying with legal obligations
Depending on the case, processing is based on the performance of a contract, an overriding legitimate interest, your consent, or a legal obligation.

cookies.title: Cookies and Analytics
cookies.content:
Our website uses technically necessary cookies that are required for proper operation. Where we use cookies or analytics services to measure reach, we do so only on the basis of your consent or in anonymised form.
You can delete cookies or restrict their storage at any time in your browser settings. This may affect the functionality of the website.

sharing.title: Disclosure to Third Parties
sharing.content:
We do not sell your personal data. Disclosure only takes place where it is necessary to deliver our services or required by law:
• To carefully selected processors (e.g. hosting, email and IT service providers) who are contractually bound to comply with data protection
• To authorities or courts where we are legally obliged to do so

hosting.title: Hosting and Data Storage
hosting.content:
The data of our website and services is stored by default in data centres in the EU or, if preferred, in Switzerland. On request, we offer local hosting as well as data stored exclusively in Switzerland.
All service providers we use are carefully selected and contractually bound to an adequate level of data protection.

retention.title: Retention Period
retention.content: We process and store personal data only for as long as required for the respective purposes or as legal retention periods demand. After that, the data is deleted or anonymised.

security.title: Data Security
security.content:
We take appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your data against unauthorised access, loss or misuse. These include in particular encrypted transmission (TLS/SSL), access controls, a secure infrastructure and regular reviews.
Please note that data transmission over the internet can never be fully secure despite all due care.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content:
Under the applicable data protection laws, you have the following rights:
• Access to the data we process about you
• Rectification of inaccurate data
• Erasure or restriction of processing
• Release or portability of your data
• Objection to certain processing activities
• Withdrawal of a given consent with effect for the future
To exercise your rights, a message to privacy@habb.ch is sufficient. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority – in Switzerland the Federal Data Protection and Information Commissioner (FDPIC).

international.title: Data Transfers Abroad
international.content: Where data is transferred to countries outside Switzerland or the European Economic Area, we ensure an adequate level of data protection through appropriate safeguards, such as standard contractual clauses.

changes.title: Changes to This Privacy Policy
changes.content: We reserve the right to amend this privacy policy at any time in order to align it with changes in the legal framework or adjustments to our services. The version published on this website applies in each case.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: For questions about data protection or to exercise your rights, please contact Habb Switzerland at privacy@habb.ch. We will handle your request as quickly as possible.

acceptance.title: Scope
acceptance.content:
These Terms and Conditions govern the use of the website www.habb.ch as well as all contracts and services between Habb Switzerland and its customers.
By accessing the website or commissioning a service, you accept these Terms. Deviating terms of the customer apply only if expressly acknowledged in writing by Habb Switzerland.

services.title: Services
services.content:
Habb Switzerland provides technology, software and consulting services, including the ERP and automation solution HABB One. The type and scope of services result from the respective offer or individual agreement.
Our solutions are modular and can be adapted and extended to the customer's industry and processes on request.

quotes.title: Offers and Conclusion of Contract
quotes.content:
Offers and quotations from Habb Switzerland are non-binding unless expressly stated otherwise. A contract is concluded upon written order confirmation by Habb Switzerland or upon commencement of the services.
Side agreements and amendments require written form to be valid.

obligations.title: Customer Cooperation
obligations.content:
The customer provides Habb Switzerland with all information, documents and access required for the provision of services in a timely and complete manner and designates a responsible contact person.
Delays caused by insufficient cooperation of the customer are not at the expense of Habb Switzerland.

prices.title: Prices and Payment Terms
prices.content:
Unless agreed otherwise, all prices are quoted in Swiss francs (CHF) plus statutory VAT. The prices stated in the respective offer apply.
Invoices are payable within 30 days of the invoice date without deduction. In the event of default, Habb Switzerland may charge default interest and reasonable reminder fees.

intellectual.title: Intellectual Property and Usage Rights
intellectual.content:
All content on this website as well as all concepts, software components and documents developed by Habb Switzerland are protected by copyright and remain the property of Habb Switzerland.
The customer receives a non-exclusive right to use the agreed deliverables, limited to the contractual purpose, unless agreed otherwise in writing.

warranty.title: Warranty
warranty.content:
Habb Switzerland provides its services with due care and in accordance with recognised professional standards. The customer inspects the services upon receipt and reports any defects without delay.
In the case of justified notices of defect, Habb Switzerland remedies the defect within a reasonable period by way of rectification.

liability.title: Liability
liability.content:
Habb Switzerland is liable for damages only in the event of intent or gross negligence. Liability for slight negligence as well as for indirect damage, consequential damage, lost profit or data loss is excluded to the extent permitted by law.
Habb Switzerland accepts no responsibility for the content of linked third-party websites.

dataprotection.title: Data Protection
dataprotection.content: Habb Switzerland processes personal data in accordance with the Swiss Data Protection Act and – where applicable – the GDPR. Details of data processing are set out in the Privacy Policy.

term.title: Contract Term and Termination
term.content: The term of a contract is governed by the individual agreement. Unless agreed otherwise, a continuing obligation may be terminated by either party in writing subject to a reasonable notice period. The right to extraordinary termination for good cause remains reserved.

governing.title: Governing Law and Place of Jurisdiction
governing.content:
These Terms and all contracts with Habb Switzerland are governed exclusively by the substantive law of Switzerland, excluding conflict-of-law rules and the UN Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods.
The exclusive place of jurisdiction is the registered office of Habb Switzerland, unless the law provides for a mandatory alternative jurisdiction.

changes.title: Changes to These Terms
changes.content: Habb Switzerland reserves the right to amend these Terms at any time. The version valid at the time of conclusion of the contract or use of the website applies. The current version is published on this website.

severability.title: Severability Clause
severability.content: Should individual provisions of these Terms be or become wholly or partially invalid, the validity of the remaining provisions remains unaffected. The invalid provision is replaced by a provision that comes closest to its economic purpose.
